company.name: Eli Lilly
company.subtitle: Mounjaro+Zepbound $40B+ run-rate · Orforglipron oral GLP-1 · $80-83B 2026 guide
company.cashRunway: Highly cash generative ($63.5B 2025 revenue, profitable, growing 45%+ YoY)

market.notes: Mounjaro: $26.1B 2025, Zepbound: $13.5B 2025. Combined Q4: $11.7B ($47B annualized). 60.5% US incretin market share. Zepbound 71% new US obesity Rx. 2026 guide: $80-83B total revenue. Manufacturing capacity +60% H1 2026. Walmart LillyDirect partnership at $349/mo.

First oral non-peptide GLP-1 RA. FDA approved under National Priority Voucher program Apr 2026. Addresses needle-phobic patients + broader primary care market. Phase 3: significant weight loss. Could expand total GLP-1 market by 2-3x. Peak $10-20B.

Triple agonist (GLP-1/GIP/glucagon). Phase 2: up to 24% weight loss at 48 weeks — best-in-class. Phase 3 ongoing. Could be the Keytruda of obesity if triple mechanism shows metabolic benefits beyond weight loss. Phase 3 for MASH + knee OA + sleep apnea.
Verzenio (breast cancer): $4.7B 2025. Taltz (psoriasis): stable. Kisunla (Alzheimer's): launched 2024. Jaypirca (MCL). Non-incretin revenue grew 20% in Q4 2023. Diversified beyond obesity.

mega_bear.narrative: GLP-1 pricing collapse + competition + orforglipron disappoints
events: ✗ IRA/government pricing pressure collapses GLP-1 margins
✗ Novo Nordisk CagriSema + Amgen MariTide take major share
✗ Orforglipron oral efficacy gap too wide vs injectables — slow uptake
→ Revenue stalls at $70-75B, PE compresses from 50x to 25x

bear.narrative: Growth decelerates + competition intensifies + pricing headwinds
events: ~ Tirzepatide growth slows to 15-20% as market matures
~ Orforglipron approved but 12-15% weight loss (vs 22% injectable)
✗ Retatrutide Phase 3 delayed or mixed results in some indications
→ Revenue $85-90B by 2028, still growing but below expectations

base.narrative: GLP-1 dominance continues + orforglipron expands TAM + retatrutide next wave
events: ✓ Tirzepatide franchise $50B+ by 2028 — dominant in T2D + obesity
✓ Orforglipron expands GLP-1 market 2x (oral access, primary care)
✓ Retatrutide Phase 3 best-in-class weight loss — filing 2028
✓ 2026 guide $80-83B met — strongest growth in large pharma

bull.narrative: Obesity market $150B+ by 2030 — Lilly captures 50%+ — first $2T pharma
events: ✓ Tirzepatide + orforglipron = $70B+ combined peak
✓ Retatrutide 24% weight loss → new obesity standard
✓ Obesity expands to MASH, CKD, sleep apnea, heart failure — all indications
✓ Lilly revenue $120B+ by 2030 — most valuable company in healthcare

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Obesity rewrites human health — Lilly becomes the most important healthcare company on Earth
events: ✓ GLP-1 class proven to reduce CV events, cancer risk, dementia
✓ Total incretin market reaches $200B+ by 2032
✓ Lilly + orforglipron + retatrutide = $100B+ combined franchise
✓ Lilly surpasses $2T market cap, joins Apple/NVIDIA tier

lastData.title: $63.5B 2025 revenue (+45%), 2026 guide $80-83B
points: Zepbound: 71% of new US obesity Rx
Retatrutide: Phase 3 across obesity, MASH, knee OA, sleep apnea

nextCatalyst.title: Orforglipron launch + tirzepatide continued ramp + retatrutide data
thresholds: Orforglipron commercial launch — first oral GLP-1
Q1 2026 earnings: can Lilly maintain $80B+ trajectory?
Manufacturing capacity ramp — supply meeting demand?

risks: $740B market cap at ~50x 2025 PE — any miss devastating
GLP-1 pricing under political/IRA pressure — margins at risk
Novo Nordisk (CagriSema, oral semaglutide 2.0) + Amgen (MariTide) competition
Orforglipron efficacy gap vs injectables — will patients switch?
Retatrutide triple agonist Phase 3 — safety signals possible
Obesity as 'discretionary healthcare' — economic slowdown risk
Concentration risk: >60% of revenue from tirzepatide franchise
